channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Securing multicloud (Azure, AWS & GCP) with Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Connector best practices
item.description: Many organizations run workloads across multiple cloud providers and need to maintain a strong security posture while ensuring interoperability. Microsoft Defender for Cloud is a cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) solution that helps secure these environments by providing unified...
item.dc:creator: ckyalo

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Update 26200.8079 Fails to Install with Error 0xc0000409
item.description: My Windows 11 Beta Channel Insider Preview update (26200.8079, KB5079482) keeps failing. It hits 100% instantly on reboot, then rolls back, showing error 0xc0000409. Anyone else having this issue, or know a fix?
item.dc:creator: Eorku

item.title: Windows 11 Pro won't activate, shows Home edition digital license
item.description: My Windows 11 Pro can't activate. Troubleshooting says the device only has a Home edition digital license. I tried reinstalling as per the official guide but it still doesn't work. Need help.
item.dc:creator: Yhooum

item.title: Windows11 Customization Update Stuck on Loading
item.description: My Windows11 shows "Customizing features, update 57% complete" but it's stuck on the loading screen. Any fixes?
item.dc:creator: ArkansasQuapaw

item.title: PHP 8.5 is now available on Azure App Service for Linux
item.description: PHP 8.5 is now available on Azure App Service for Linux across all public regions. You can create a new PHP 8.5 app through the Azure portal, automate it with the Azure CLI, or deploy using ARM/Bicep templates. PHP 8.5 brings several useful runtime improvements. It includes better diagnostics, with...
item.dc:creator: TulikaC

item.title: A simpler way to deploy your code to Azure App Service for Linux
item.description: We’ve added a new deployment experience for Azure App Service for Linux that makes it easier to get your code running on your web app. To get started, go to the Kudu/SCM site for your app: <sitename>.scm.azurewebsites.net From there, open the new Deployments experience. You can now deploy your app...
item.dc:creator: TulikaC

item.title: How do you run engagement surveys with Forms, effectively?
item.description: We run quarterly engagement surveys through Forms and the response rate is decent. But the problem is what happens after. The results go into a PowerPoint, leadership discusses it once, and then nothing changes until next quarter when we ask the same questions again. My boss asked me to find a way...
item.dc:creator: CandyMullany

item.title: How to create video with images using AI on windows?
item.description: Hey everyone,I heard it is easy to turn a bunch of photos into a simple video on a Windows PC using AI tools. In fact, there are built-in options like Microsoft Photos and traditional editors such as Windows Movie Maker, but they feel a bit basic or outdated for smoother transitions and...
item.dc:creator: Castiellm

item.title: Leverage User and Group Assignments to Limit User Access to Apps
item.description: User and Group assignments can be added to Entra ID applications. Once assignments exist for an application, only assigned users can access that application. This method is a good way to secure access to applications that have consent to use high-profile permissions like Sites.FullControl.All or...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: OneNote breaks if I move it onto an external display
item.description: Hi guysI use OneNote extensively for work as my virtual notepad. At most of my working locations, I use my laptop - Dell Latitude 7440 - connected to either a Dell Docking station + 2 monitors, or a pair of samsung monitors which have an inbuilt hub, connect via USB-C and are daisychained together....
item.dc:creator: Alex_NTL

item.title: Tuesday night's UFL game between Dallas and St.
item.description: Louis on FS1 totaled 156,000 viewers. | Aidan Burke (UFL Center).
item.dc:creator: Sawyeryo

item.title: Flagging anti-cheat as a Trojan on Windows PC
item.description: I'm experiencing an issue where my anti-cheat software is being flagged as a Trojan by Windows Defender on my PC, and I'm not sure why this is happening or how to resolve it. I've tried to reinstall the anti-cheat software, update Windows Defender, and run a full system scan, but the issue...
item.dc:creator: Lawrencepp

item.title: The "IQ Layer": Microsoft’s Blueprint for the Agentic Enterprise
item.description: The "IQ Layer": Microsoft’s Blueprint for the Agentic Enterprise Modern enterprises have experimented with artificial intelligence for years, yet many deployments have struggled to move beyond basic automation and conversational interfaces. The fundamental limitation has not been the reasoning...
item.dc:creator: harshul05

item.title: Connecting Windows 11 users with Microsoft
item.description: "Listening to how we can keep making it better for you": Windows Insider meetups are coming back after years away, connecting Windows 11 users with Microsoft.
item.dc:creator: Brycennin

item.title: Can I still transfer data from Android to iPhone after setup without reset?
item.description: I already finished setting up my Samsung Galaxy S23 and recently got an iPhone 17 Pro Max. The problem is, I didn't use the "Move to iOS" option during the initial setup, and now all my data (photos, contacts, messages, etc.) is still on my Android phone. I really don't want to reset the iPhone...
item.dc:creator: GideonWells

item.title: Agent Governance Toolkit: Architecture Deep Dive, Policy Engines, Trust, and SRE for AI Agents
item.description: Last week we announced the Agent Governance Toolkit on the Microsoft Open Source Blog, an open-source project that brings runtime security governance to autonomous AI agents. In that announcement, we covered the why: AI agents are making autonomous decisions in production, and the security patterns...
item.dc:creator: mosiddi

item.title: Putting Agentic Platform Engineering to the test
item.description: In Part 1 of this blog series set the stage for why platform engineering is being reshaped by agentic AI. (read it here) Basically we outline how instead of humans translating intent through layers of CLIs, SDKs, and bespoke workflows, capable agents can interpret natural-language goals and turn...
item.dc:creator: Arnaud Lheureux, davidwright, Suzanne Daniels

item.title: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | March 2026
item.description: ﻿March ships Foundry Agent Service GA with private networking, GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini, Priority Processing, Phi-4 Reasoning Vision, SDK 2.0 GA across Python, JS/TS, Java, and .NET, Fireworks AI and NVIDIA Nemotron models, and third-party guardrails from Palo Alto and Zenity. The post What’s new...
item.dc:creator: Nick Brady

item.title: Estimate Microsoft Sentinel Costs with Confidence Using the New Sentinel Cost Estimator
item.description: One of the first questions teams ask when evaluating Microsoft Sentinel is simple: what will this actually cost? Today, many customers and partners estimate Sentinel costs using the Azure Pricing Calculator, but it doesn’t provide the Sentinel-specific usage guidance needed to understand how each...
item.dc:creator: shubh_khandhadia

item.title: OneDrive at the Microsoft 365 Community Conference 2026
item.description: The Microsoft 365 Community Conference is the ultimate Microsoft 365 community event—and the perfect place to expand your skills and knowledge in Microsoft 365 and Copilot. Come connect with the OneDrive team to learn what’s new, what’s next, and how to work smarter with AI. With over 200+ expert...
item.dc:creator: sophiapeng

item.title: Ask Copilot in security assessments now available
item.description: Organization admins and security managers can now jump into a Copilot experience directly from secret risk assessment or Code Security risk assessment results to get contextual explanations and guided next… The post Ask Copilot in security assessments now available appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Dylan Birtolo

item.title: Foundry Local is now Generally Available
item.description: Ship local AI to millions of devices - fast, private on-device inference with no per-token costs. The post Foundry Local is now Generally Available appeared first on Microsoft Foundry Blog.
item.dc:creator: samkemp

item.title: The agentic SOC—Rethinking SecOps for the next decade
item.description: In the SOC of the future, autonomous defense moves at machine speed, agents add context and coordination, and humans focus on judgment, risk, and outcomes. The post The agentic SOC—Rethinking SecOps for the next decade appeared first on Microsoft Security Blog.
item.dc:creator: Rob Lefferts and David Weston

item.title: Microsoft Entra expands SCIM support with new SCIM 2.0 APIs for identity lifecycle operations
item.description: Modern organizations rely on a growing ecosystem of applications, platforms, and services to run their business. Managing users and groups consistently across these systems is essential for security and operational efficiency. Many teams rely on the System for Cross-domain Identity Management...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: How we build and use Azure SRE Agent with agentic workflows
item.description: The Challenge: Ops is critical but takes time from innovation Microsoft operates always-on, mission-critical production systems at extraordinary scale. Thousands of services, millions of deployments, and constant change are the reality of modern cloud engineering. These are titan systems that power...
item.dc:creator: Shamir_AbdulAziz

item.title: Windows Insider update not Installing
item.description: Hey there is a update Windows Insider update i am updating it downloads then installs also but when it restarts it shows same as before there is a update pending downloads i have done several times but it doesn't install completely so please help me solve this problem
item.dc:creator: fizaalam444

item.title: New Low Quality option in the Hide comment menu
item.description: GitHub moderators can now classify hidden comments as Low Quality, a new option in the Hide comment dropdown menu available across issues, discussions, pull requests, and commits. Previously, the available… The post New Low Quality option in the Hide comment menu appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: New Sort by control added to Notifications
item.description: A new “Sort by” control appears on the Notifications page, with two options: Newest to oldest (which matches the previous behavior) and Oldest to newest. The selected sort order applies… The post New Sort by control added to Notifications appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Repository member role labels now in pull request list view
item.description: You can now see repository member role labels directly in the pull request list view for public repositories. Role labels, such as First-time contributor, Contributor, and Member, now appear inline… The post Repository member role labels now in pull request list view appeared first on The GitHub...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Advancing to Agentic AI with Azure NetApp Files VS Code Extension v1.2.0
item.description: Table of Contents Abstract Introducing Agentic AI: The Agent Volume Scan Why This Matters Why AI-Informed Operations Core Components Enhanced Natural Language Interface AI-Powered Analysis and Templates What are the Benefits? Business Benefits Economic Benefits Technical Benefits Real‑World...
item.dc:creator: GeertVanTeylingen

item.title: Running Multiple Instances of an Aspire AppHost Without Port Conflicts
item.description: Aspire 13.2 introduces isolated mode, letting you run multiple instances of the same AppHost in parallel without port conflicts. Learn how the --isolated flag solves development and testing workflows. The post Running Multiple Instances of an Aspire AppHost Without Port Conflicts appeared first on...
item.dc:creator: James Newton-King

item.title: Monitor AI Agents on App Service with OpenTelemetry and the New Application Insights Agents View
item.description: Part 2 of 2: In Blog 1, we deployed a multi-agent travel planner on Azure App Service using the Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) 1.0 GA. This post dives deep into how we instrumented those agents with OpenTelemetry and lit up the brand-new Agents (Preview) view in Application Insights. 📋...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: Announcing Private Preview: Deploy Ansible Playbooks using Azure Policy via Machine Configuration
item.description: Azure Arc is on a mission to unify security, compliance, and management for Windows and Linux machines—anywhere. By extending Azure’s control plane beyond the cloud, Azure Arc enables organizations to unify governance, compliance, security and management of servers across on‑premises, edge, and...
item.dc:creator: alinetran

item.title: Build Multi-Agent AI Apps on Azure App Service with Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0
item.description: A couple of months ago, we published a three-part series showing how to build multi-agent AI systems on Azure App Service using preview packages from the Microsoft Agent Framework (MAF) (formerly AutoGen / Semantic Kernel Agents). The series walked through async processing, the request-reply...
item.dc:creator: jordanselig

item.title: As AI adoption scales, is your access strategy still viable?
item.description: As AI moves from experimentation into everyday workflows and AI agents begin operating more autonomously across systems, access environments are changing in scale, complexity, and speed. Our latest research, Secure access in the age of AI , looks at how security leaders are navigating one of the...
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin_Murphy

item.title: Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields
item.description: This update brings release tracking closer to your issues, configurable defaults for project fields, and faster navigation across related issues. Release information in the issue sidebar When an issue is… The post Release information in issue sidebar and default values for project fields appeared...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Sovereignty in Azure Belgium Central: A Three-Layer Technical Deep Dive
item.description: When Belgium Central went live in November 2025, it marked the launch of a new Azure region for Belgian organizations operating in the EU. For many scenarios, it enables customers to run workloads in-country and apply technical controls that can support sovereignty requirements. But "sovereignty"...
item.dc:creator: wesback

item.title: Investigating Storm-2755: “Payroll pirate” attacks targeting Canadian employees
item.description: Microsoft Incident Response – Detection and Response Team (DART) researchers observed an emerging, financially motivated threat actor, tracked as Storm-2755, compromising Canadian employee accounts to gain unauthorized access to employee profiles and divert salary payments to attacker-controlled...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Incident Response

item.title: Intent redirection vulnerability in third-party SDK exposed millions of Android wallets to potential risk
item.description: A severe Android intent‑redirection vulnerability in a widely deployed SDK exposed sensitive user data across millions of apps. Microsoft researchers detail how the flaw works, why it matters, and how developers can mitigate similar risks by updating affected SDKs. The post Intent redirection...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: Building an End-to-End MLOps Pipeline: From Training to Managed Endpoints on Azure
item.description: Introduction Machine learning models are only as valuable as the infrastructure that supports them. A model trained in a Jupyter notebook and saved to a shared folder creates a chain of problems: no versioning, no reproducibility, no clear ownership, and no automated path to production. When the...
item.dc:creator: Gapandey

item.title: Windows 11 After setting SDR brightness to match HDR, does it still look the same?
item.description: In Windows 11's HDR settings, if I adjust the SDR content brightness slider to match the HDR level, will SDR content still display normally? Will it cause overexposure or color issues?
item.dc:creator: Wrentdr

item.title: Windows 11 Favorites star turned black, how to change back to blue?
item.description: The favorites star icon in my browser turned black on Windows 11. How can I change it back to blue?
item.dc:creator: Lucienw

item.title: Windows 11 Search Crashes When Connected to Internet
item.description: Windows 11 search works fine offline, but when connected to the internet, the search box freezes for 1 second then crashes. I’ve updated Windows, turned off cloud/secure search, enabled desktop interaction, and restarted, but nothing works. Need help fixing this.
item.dc:creator: PhoenixAdler

item.title: What’s new in Fabric Eventstream: 2026 Q1 Edition
item.description: Coauthor: Arindam Chatterjee Over the first quarter of 2026, Fabric Eventstreams shipped meaningful improvements across three themes that have repeatedly come up in feedback from our broad community of customers and partners: broader connectivity, richer real-time processing, and secure...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Associated identities for items (Preview)
item.description: Background Currently, many items rely on the item’s owner identity for accessing connections and certain features (like delegated mode in SQL endpoint) specific to the item. If the owner leaves the organization or their credentials expire, items can become partially or fully non-functional. We’ve...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Look for the best sd card recovery software that still works now
item.description: I was out shooting b-roll for a project yesterday on my Sony A7III. When I got home to offload the footage, my computer asked me to format the card before I could use it. I panicked and plugged it back into my camera, and now the camera says "No files."The card is a Sandisk Extreme Pro 128GB. I...
item.dc:creator: JaggerKnox

item.title: Enterprise UAMI Design in Azure: Trust Boundaries and Blast Radius
item.description: As organizations move toward secretless authentication models in Azure, Managed Identity has become the preferred approach for enabling secure communication between services. User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI) in particular offers flexibility that allows identity reuse across multiple compute...
item.dc:creator: AmitManchanda28

item.title: SSID connection using intune pushed profile kept prompting manual login
item.description: Hi, anyone encountered an issue where users connecting to an SSID with 802.1X authentication using an Intune-pushed Wi-Fi profile (with credential caching enabled) are still being prompted to enter their credentials manually? However, it works fine by configuring the network connection protocol...
item.dc:creator: SSChew

item.title: Understanding Agentic Function-Calling with Multi-Modal Data Access
item.description: What You'll Learn Why traditional API design struggles when questions span multiple data sources, and how function-calling solves this. How the iterative tool-use loop works — the model plans, calls tools, inspects results, and repeats until it has a complete answer. What makes an agent truly...
item.dc:creator: jayesh_mevada

item.title: Deploying to Azure Web App from Azure DevOps Using UAMI
item.description: TOC UAMI Configuration App Configuration Azure DevOps Configuration Logs UAMI Configuration Create a User Assigned Managed Identity with no additional configuration.This identity will be mentioned in later steps, especially at Object ID. App Configuration On an existing Azure Web App, enable...
item.dc:creator: theringe
